summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cloudinary image upload integration for admin product creation. Backend API testing shows 100% success rate (20/20 tests passed) including new Cloudinary signature endpoints. Frontend testing shows excellent admin panel functionality with proper image uploader, form fields, and navigation. All core features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/cloudinary/signature returns valid signature, timestamp, cloud_name, api_key, folder when admin authenticated
Admin login works correctly with admin@premiumsphere.com / Admin@123
Admin can navigate to /admin via user menu 'Admin Panel' link
Admin panel loads with correct stats: 20 Products, 2 Orders, 4 Users, 6 Categories
Admin panel Add Product form shows image uploader with drag-and-drop area
Admin panel Add Product form has all required fields: Product Name, Description, Price, Original Price
Admin panel has collapsible 'More options' section for category, badge, flags
Create Product button is present and functional
Admin panel tabs (Products, Categories, Orders) work correctly
Edit product functionality accessible via edit buttons
Homepage loads correctly with products and categories
Product cards display correctly with images (30 products found)
All 6 categories display correctly: Subscriptions, Gaming, Software, Gift Cards, AI & Tools, Game Top-Up
Search functionality works correctly (Netflix search returns results)
Product badges (HOT, NEW, DEAL) display correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all admin panel and integration tests passed)
